art_direction.description: An award-worthy, high-energy Awwwards-style design. The marketing page is bold, utilizing kinetic typography, immersive 3D elements (Spline), and scroll-linked animations. The authenticated dashboard leans into functional Neo-Brutalism: high contrast, sharp interfaces, and deep focus, ensuring optimal usability while retaining the brand's edgy personality.

rules: No pure #000000 or #ffffff without purpose. Use tinted neutrals.
Limit the primary/accent neon colors strictly to interactive elements (CTAs, active states) and key graphical highlights.
Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards on hover states.
H1 (Hero): Fluid text-5xl to text-7xl, tight tracking (tracking-tighter), leading-none.
Never use Inter or generic sans for headings. Unbounded gives the Y2K/Tech vibe.
Body text should be highly legible, using Outfit.

spacing_and_layout.dashboard_spacing: Dense (p-4 to p-6 for cards, gap-4 to gap-6 for grids).
spacing_and_layout.corners: Rounded cards (rounded-2xl) in the dashboard, but offset with sharp inner elements for a tech feel.

landing_page_blueprint.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70), Brand Logo left, Navigation center, Google Login CTA right.

hero.motion: Kinetic text reveal on load. Use framer-motion to mask and reveal H1 line-by-line.
hero.3d_element: Integrate @splinetool/react-spline for a Gen-Z 3D interactive floating shape or abstract e-commerce elements (boxes/spheres) in the background or side.
hero.content: Massive H1: 'Listings that Outsmart the Algorithm.' Subtitle, Primary CTA: 'Start Generating - It\'s Free'.

landing_page_blueprint.marquee: Slow, editorial marquee ticker with outlined text ('AMAZON • FLIPKART • AI GENERATION') using react-fast-marquee.

manifesto_chapters.description: Numbered scroll-reveal sections explaining the AI logic.
manifesto_chapters.visuals: Real product photography (e.g., floating sneakers) in clipped, rounded frames with a spotlight effect.

landing_page_blueprint.showcase: Bento grid layout showing mockups of the AI generating 5 bullets and SEO keywords.
landing_page_blueprint.footer: Massive typography (text-[10vw]) 'AI STUDIO', dark high-contrast area.

dashboard_app_system.layout: Sidebar Navigation on left (Dashboard, Products, Bulk Upload, Exports, Settings), Main content area on right.
dashboard_app_system.topbar: Search bar, Dark Mode Toggle, User Profile.
dashboard_app_system.dashboard_home: 4 Stat Cards (Total Products, Draft, Completed, Exported). Recent Products Table with Search & Filter, 'Add Product' Button.
dashboard_app_system.add_product_page: Multi-field form (Title, Category, Price, etc.) + Multiple Image Upload dropzone.
dashboard_app_system.product_details_page: Tabs (Shadcn Tabs): Product Information, Amazon Listing, Flipkart Listing, SEO Keywords, History.
dashboard_app_system.ai_review_screen: Editable text areas for generated content. Each section (Title, Bullets, Desc) has inline buttons: Copy, Regenerate, Save.
dashboard_app_system.bulk_upload: Drag and drop area for Excel/CSV, Table preview of parsed data, 'Generate Listings for All' button.
dashboard_app_system.exports: List of recent exports with download buttons (Amazon/Flipkart/Generic .xlsx).
dashboard_app_system.settings: Form for AI Provider, API Key, Default Marketplace, Brand Tone, Language, Defaults.

components.cards: Subtle borders (border-border), flat backgrounds. Hover: slight negative Y translation (-translate-y-1) and enhanced shadow.
components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) for marketing, rounded-md for dashboard. Primary buttons use the Accent color (e.g., Acid Green in dark mode) with black text for high contrast.
components.tables: Shadcn Tables. Clean, 1px bottom borders, hover background on rows.
components.forms: Shadcn Form elements. Floating labels or clean stacked labels.
components.tabs: Shadcn Tabs. Override height if needed. Active tab should have high contrast text and clear indicator.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling on the landing page.
motion_and_interactions.reveals: Framer Motion 'whileInView' for section reveals (fade up, slight scale).
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: All buttons need hover and active states (scale down slightly on active).
motion_and_interactions.loading: Skeleton loaders (Shadcn) for dashboard data. Bespoke ASCII or spinner loader for AI Generation action.
motion_and_interactions.toasts: Use Sonner for all success/error notifications (e.g., 'Listing Regenerated').

hero_abstract_3d.description: Yellow ball and pink object abstract 3d shape. Use in hero or feature backgrounds.

product_sneakers_1.description: Floating white and red Nike sneaker. Use in the manifesto/showcase section.

product_sneakers_2.description: Athletic shoes on a white box. Use for product details mockup page.

dashboard_mockup.description: Graphs of performance analytics on a laptop screen. Use as a background or contextual image for the dashboard features.

accessibility: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Ensure contrast ratios meet APCA standards.
Support prefers-reduced-motion for all Framer Motion animations.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Install required fonts: Unbounded and Outfit via Google Fonts in index.html or import in CSS.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Setup Tailwind with the exact color variables provided for light and dark modes. Ensure dark mode toggle works seamlessly.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Implement the marketing landing page in `src/pages/Landing.jsx` (or similar). Integrate Lenis for the entire app but especially optimized for the landing route. Use Spline for the 3D hero moment.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Build the Dashboard layout with a fixed Sidebar and dynamic main content area using react-router-dom.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Use Shadcn components for Buttons, Cards, Inputs, Tables, and Tabs in the dashboard to maintain a clean SaaS look.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Add `data-testid` to all forms, inputs, tabs, and action buttons.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Do not center align `.App`. Keep text left-aligned by default unless in a specific hero container.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic AI slop. Create depth with layered elements and z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects carefully with backdrop-blur-xl.
Never apply `transition: all`. Use specific transitions like `transition: transform 0.2s ease`.
Use modern button styles with clear hover/active state changes.
Do not use AI emoji characters for icons; use lucide-react.
Use generous spacing (p-8, p-12) for the landing page to avoid cramped designs.
Prioritize Shadcn components in `src/components/ui/` for consistency.
